stats.fact: Azure is used by approximately 85% of Fortune 500 companies
Azure held 21% of enterprise cloud infrastructure spending in Q4 2025, up from 20% in Q3 2025
Bicep code is approximately half the size of an equivalent ARM JSON template, significantly reducing authoring burden
stats.source: TechTarget: Compare Azure Bicep vs. ARM templates

stats.fact: A manufacturing company reduced infrastructure provisioning time by 70% using Bicep templates for automated deployments
Azure Verified Modules (AVM) are prebuilt, pretested modules published to the Public Bicep Registry, standardizing enterprise deployments
stats.source: Microsoft Community Hub: Release of Bicep Azure Verified Modules for Platform Landing Zone

stats.fact: Bicep v0.43.1 (2026) added like() and distinct() functions for advanced pattern matching and data operations
Microsoft recommends Bicep as the primary authoring experience for all new ARM deployments as of 2026
stats.source: Microsoft Learn: What is Bicep? - Azure Resource Manager
